stem: In a figure, lines r and s are parallel and are cut by transversal t. The angle that transversal t makes with line r on one side measures 124°, and the corresponding angle that t makes with line s on the same side of t measures x°. What is the value of x?
rationale: Because lines r and s are parallel and are cut by transversal t, the corresponding angles formed at the two intersections are equal. The given angle measures 124°, so the corresponding angle x° also measures 124°. Therefore x = 124.
